zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding於從1430年到1431年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾時，她的父親John Iv Seyton of St Liz41歲，母親Jane Bellers31歲。她於1449年與Sir William de Fielding在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1480年之後在英國萊希斯特斯爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾盧特沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding于从1430年到1431年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾时，她的父亲John Iv Seyton of St Liz41岁，母亲Jane Bellers31岁。她于1449年与Sir William de Fielding在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1480年之后在英国萊希斯特斯爾，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾盧特沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Liz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from Liz in Lugo province, Galicia (Spain). As a Hispanic name it may also be an altered form of   Lis  . Compare   Deliz  .

variants.name: Lis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Stanislaw, Wladyslaw, Andrzej, Casimir, Ignatius, Malgorzata, Slawomir, Tadeusz, Tomasz, Boleslaw, Bronislaw, Darek.

Polish, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Polish and Czech dialect lis ‘fox’, Upper Sorbian lis ‘he-fox’, a nickname for a cunning person or, in the case of the Jewish name, an artificial name. The presumably cognate Sorbian surname Liš is found in Germanized and probably also Americanized forms, only (see Liesch and Lish ). Compare also Lese , Lies , and Liss .
Czech: nickname for a man with a bald pate, from a variant of the adjective lysý ‘bald’.

nameMeanings.name: Aka
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (from North Africa): from the male personal name ʿAdda, used in the Maghreb, a pet form of any of the many names beginning with ʿAbd ‘servant’.
Turkish: ornamental or topographic name from ada ‘island’.
Filipino: unexplained.

nameMeanings.name: Fielding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Fielden  .
English: occasionally from a Middle English survival of Old English felding ‘dweller in the field(s), open country’.
Irish: possibly a variant of McField (see McPhail ).

variants.name: Fielden
meanings: English: from a Middle English survival of the dative plural of Old English feld, denoting someone who lived ‘in the fields’. The lost district name Feldon in Warwickshire may be named with this word. Perhaps also a habitational name from Feldom in Marske, North Yorkshire, recorded as Feldon in 1231. See Field .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding was born from 1430 to 1431, in Huntingdonshire, England, her father, John Iv Seyton of St Liz, was 41 and her mother, Jane Bellers, was 31. She married Sir William de Fielding in 1449, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1480, in Leicestershire, England, and was buried in Lutterworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding est née du 1430 au 1431, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, son père, John Iv Seyton of St Liz, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Jane Bellers, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Fielding en 1449, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1480, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding von 1430 bis 1431 in Huntingdonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Iv Seyton of St Liz 41 und ihre Mutter Jane Bellers 31. Sie hat 1449 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir William de Fielding geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1480 in Leicestershire, England und wurde in Lutterworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding è nata il da 1430 a 1431 nel Huntingdonshire, England, sua padre, John Iv Seyton of St Liz, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Jane Bellers, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Fielding nel 1449, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1480, nel Leicestershire, England, e fu sepolta a Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes De St Liz Aka Fieldingがから1430年まで1431年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Iv Seyton of St Lizは41歳，母Jane Bellersは31歳であった。1449年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでSir William de Fieldingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1480年以後にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアルッテルウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding(이)가 1430년 부터 1431년 까지 영국 헌틴그도실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Iv Seyton of St Liz(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Bellers(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 Sir William de Fielding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 이후 영국 레이스스터실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 루터워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding nasceu de 1430 a 1431, em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Iv Seyton of St Liz, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Jane Bellers, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Fielding em 1449, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1480, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding родилась с 1430 по 1431 в местности хантингдоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Iv Seyton of St Liz было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Bellers, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Fielding в 1449 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1480 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия и была похоронена в местности луттирворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding nació desde 1430 hasta 1431, en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Iv Seyton of St Liz, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Jane Bellers, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir William de Fielding en 1449, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1480, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
